MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 3 

ALZH_DEMEN_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the Alzheimer's disease and related disorders or 
senile dementia indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) Alzheimer's disease and related disorders or senile dementia indicator. The
